summary: Iteration 12: Backend Refactoring + Duo Subscriptions + Review History testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - Duo member form fields and Review History charts working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended
Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful: server.py reduced from 1113 lines to ~210 lines
6 new router files correctly implemented: kpis.py, transactions.py, trainings.py, courses.py, alerts.py, reports.py
All API routes properly prefixed and working: /api/monthly-kpis, /api/transactions, /api/categories, /api/trainings, /api/courses, /api/instructors, /api/alerts/summary, /api/recurring-transactions
Duo subscription: POST /api/members with is_duo=true creates both primary and partner members with correct linking
Duo subscription: GET /api/members/{id} enriches response with duo_partner_name
Duo subscription: Frontend form has working checkbox and partner input fields (data-testid='duo-checkbox', 'duo-partner-name', etc.)
Review History: GET /api/annual-reviews/history/{member_id} returns completed reviews correctly
Review History: Frontend History modal shows LineChart with weight evolution (Poids actuel, Objectif)
Review History: Summary table shows Date, Poids, Variation, Objectif columns
Members page shows DUO badge for duo members
Reviews page shows Type badges (Trimestriel, Mensuel, etc.) with correct colors
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed data; registered test user for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully refactored with modular routers. All API endpoints working: KPIs, Transactions, Categories, Trainings, Courses, Instructors, Alerts, Recurring Transactions. Duo subscription feature creates two linked members. Review History feature shows completed reviews with weight evolution charts. Minor console warnings for accessibility (DialogContent) and React keys (TableBody).

backend_refactoring.GET_api_trainings_year: PASS - Returns trainings filtered by year

duo_subscription.POST_api_members_with_duo: PASS - Creates primary and partner members
duo_subscription.duo_partner_linking: PASS - Primary has duo_partner_id, partner has duo_partner_id pointing back
duo_subscription.frontend_duo_partner_fields: PASS - Partner name, email, phone fields appear when checkbox checked
duo_subscription.frontend_duo_badge: PASS - DUO badge visible in member list (via backend tests)

review_history.GET_api_annual_reviews_history: PASS - Returns completed reviews for member
review_history.history_weight_chart: PASS - LineChart shows weight evolution (Poids actuel, Objectif)
review_history.history_summary_table: PASS - Table shows Date, Poids, Variation, Objectif
review_history.frontend_history_button: PASS - BarChart3 icon button with data-testid='history-{id}'
review_history.frontend_history_modal: PASS - Modal opens with chart and summary
